desc: Isolate System command - isolates the selected MEP system in the current view.
summary: Isolate System command - isolates the selected MEP system in the current view. FEATURES: - Finds all elements in the same MEP system - Isolates them in the current view - Option to reset isolation
usecase: Use when you need to run this command's workflow for the current model task.
notfor: Custom UI required for advanced options. AI path is JSON-first without dialogs.
precondition: Active Revit document and required context are available.
postcondition: The command finishes with tracked success or a handled failure state.
